sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hong Hon Topa Zeisu tal-ah
Migitna nuam pha tuang
A lu tung vangliatna khu a
A muk pan itna luang
A muk pan itna luang

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Leitung mi teh pih ding om lo
Amah a pha bel hi
Vantung mi lak ah zong om lo
Amah kilawm bel hi
Amah kilawm bel hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Gimna sung ka kiat hong mu a
Hong ding hong delh pah hi
Kei ading Singlamteh pua a
Han sung pan hong hon khia
Han sung pan hong hon khia

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ama hangin kei ka nungta
Nuamna zong a hong pia
Hong gualzo sak sihna tungah
Han sung pan hong hon khia
Han sung pan hong hon khia

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Ama omna Vantung khua ah
Kei hong tum pih ding hi
Pasian phatna hong lak ding a
Ka nuamna kim ding hi
Ka nuamna kim ding hi

sections.label: Verse 6
lines: Pasian citna leh hong itna
Hi bang ka theih nung sang
Lungsim tul nei leng zong Topa
Kong pia khin ding hi Nang
Kong pia khin ding hi Nang
